title: Contract Technical Project Manager – Software Delivery
description_raw:
Harvey Nash are recruiting a Contract Technical Project Manager to lead the delivery of a greenfield SaaS platform build for a UK fintech company. This is a 12-month outside IR35 technology PM role.

The programme involves delivering a new cloud-native transaction-processing platform using AWS microservices architecture. You will work closely with the Product Owner and software engineering teams to ensure delivery milestones are met on time and on budget.

What the role involves:
- Run agile delivery ceremonies (sprint planning, daily standups, retrospectives) for a team of 15 engineers and QA
- Manage the programme-level roadmap and escalate blockers to the Head of Engineering and CTO
- Own the risk register, RAID log, and project status reporting to executive stakeholders
- Coordinate third-party SaaS integrations (Stripe, Salesforce, Snowflake)
- Manage data migration workstream (legacy on-prem Oracle → AWS RDS)

Profile:
- 7+ years delivering software development projects (SaaS / cloud preferred)
- PRINCE2 Practitioner or SAFe Agilist
- Familiarity with AWS, Jira, Confluence
- No requirement for engineering background — this is a pure delivery management role

Rate: £650 per day outside IR35
Duration: 12 months
Start: 3 August 2026
Location: Central London (hybrid — 2 days per week in office)
